title: Ruler — apply the same rules to all coding agents
excerpt: Ruler centralizes AI coding assistant instructions in a single .ruler/ directory and automatically distributes them across 30+ agents (Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Aider, Gemini CLI...). MCP servers defined once in ruler.toml are propagated to native config. Backups, ruler.toml validation, safe revert.
